SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Create multiform data based on the content provided. By default its create content#9 as output
1 to 9 parameter can be provided. the last parameter should be for the file

Values.value:
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="clientVersion" Content-Type: text/plain; charset=US-ASCII Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
1.0

Content-Disposition: form-data; name="event" Content-Type: text/plain; charset=US-ASCII Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
Import Batch Data

Content-Disposition: form-data; name="sharedSecret" Content-Type: text/plain; charset=US-ASCII Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
Aribad3v!

Content-Disposition: form-data; name="clientInfo" Content-Type: text/plain; charset=US-ASCII Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
webMethods10.15

Content-Disposition: form-data; name="clientType" Content-Type: text/plain; charset=US-ASCII Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
DataTransferTool
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="content"; filename="UserGroup.zip" Content-Type: application/octet-stream; charset=ISO-8859-1 Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Concat the Hrd and body for MIME part

INVOKE.COMMENT: Check how many parts workflow has to add as MIME

SEQUENCE.NAME: size==$iteration
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: the last part which has file as zip or without the zip

INVOKE.COMMENT: Convert content to Bytes because content has binary data
Created MIME data and save as Bytes

Values.value: Created MIME data and save as Bytes
